## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (lint, typecheck, tests, docs, api)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the contract this PR changes
- [ ] No secrets, PII, tokens, or machine-absolute paths committed
- [ ] Docs / changeset updated if this is a user-facing change (`bun run changeset`)

## 🤖 AI assistance disclosure (required)

> AI-assisted contributions are welcome — but **disclose them** so maintainers can triage
> review depth. Pick one and name the tool(s). Be honest; undisclosed AI PRs may be closed.

- [ ] Written **entirely by a human** — no AI tools used
- [ ] **AI-assisted** — AI helped with parts; a human wrote and reviewed every line
- [ ] **Largely AI-generated** — an AI agent authored most of this; a human reviewed it

**AI tool(s) used:** <!-- e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot — or "none" -->
